title: mitrephora fragrans
intro: Mitrephora fragrans is a species of plant in the family Annonaceae, native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Thailand and Malaysia. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, as well as relieving symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders and fever. Mitrephora fragrans is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, and has also been studied for its potential use in pharmaceutical applications.
